'''Slane Vick''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Private/Legends|private]] who served in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was a guard aboard the [[Ranger (Centax-class)|''Ranger'']], along with [[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] [[Ram Raders]], when General [[Nejaa Halcyon]] repelled [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] boarding the ship. He later served on the ground in a scouting mission with Corporal Raders, [[Grudo]], and [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Omin L'Loxx]]. He was also present with [[Trooper/Legends|Trooper]] [[Odie Subu]] and [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] during the rescue of the hostages in the Separatist compound, and the capture of [[Pors Tonith/Legends|Pors Tonith]].
